[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000100010 2
1 111000000 3
2 000000100 1
3 011000010 3
4 111100010 5
5 101100011 5
6 010100010 3
7 010000000 1

01 10 001100010 3
12 21 101100011 5 match 5
23 32 010100010 3 match 6
34 43 010000000 1 match 7
45 54 000000000 a
56 65 000000111 3
67 76 111000100 4
70 07 011000000 2

02 20 011100010 4
13 31 000100010 2 match 0
24 42 111000000 3 match 1
35 53 000100010 2 match 0
46 64 111000000 3 match 1
57 75 000000100 1 match 2

71 17 101000000 2

14 41 101000000 2
25 52 000100111 4
36 63 010000010 2
47 74 111000000 3 match 1

72 27 111000100 4
